name: report-performance-analysis
summary: Extract and compare sanitized live-agent report performance metrics.

mcp.boundary_notes: Post-run report analysis skill. It consumes completed artifacts and does not call robot MCP tools or expose private evaluator truth.

capability_requirements.notes: Uses completed live-agent run directories, model_call_metrics.jsonl, and report performance packets.

scripts.summary: Extract one run's sanitized report performance packet.
Compare two runs or a manifest of report performance packets.
Build calibration data for normalized model-latency estimates.

refactor_signals: metric extraction starts duplicating live-report parsing code
comparison packets need a stable schema consumed by CI or dashboards
promote_to_mcp_when: never by default; report-performance analysis is post-run artifact analysis, not a robot capability
